title: cynoglossum krasniqii
intro: Cynoglossum krasniqii is an endangered plant species native to the highlands of Albania, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In terms of herbal preparations, Cynoglossum krasniqii is often used in tea form, where the leaves are dried and brewed to create a medicinal infusion.
